author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Created config_registry.rs with ConfigType, ConfigGroup, ConfigKey, REGISTRY, PRESET_SOLO, PRESET_TEAM, find_registry_key, type_label, and HOOK_CONFIG_JSON. Updated config.rs and init.rs to import from the shared module. Removed all duplicated definitions. Bidirectional coupling eliminated — neither module imports the other. All 1665 tests pass.
